top_signals.title: Brent Oil Erases Wartime Gains as Hormuz Reopening Boosts Supply - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Brent Oil Erases Wartime Gains as Hormuz Reopening Boosts Supply  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran behind attack on cargo vessel near Oman in Strait of Hormuz, U.S. official tells MS NOW
top_signals.summary: "The only crop we're harvesting is what you planted: decades of mistrust," Iranian parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf said in a social media post.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Netherlands Seizes 800 Servers, Arrests 2 for Aiding Cyberattacks
top_signals.summary: Authorities in the Netherlands have arrested the co-owners of two related Internet hosting companies for operating IT infrastructure used by Russia to carry out cyberattacks, influence operations and disinformation campaigns inside the European Union. The two men were the focus of a 2025 KrebsOnSecurity story about how their hosting companies had assumed control over the technical infrastructure of Stark Industries Solutions, an Internet service provider sanctioned last year by the EU as a frequent staging ground for cyber mischief from Russia's intelligence agencies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Half of UK wealth advisers say clients' crypto is ‘invisible’ to them: CoinShares survey
top_signals.summary: A CoinShares survey found than many EU-based wealth management companies had policies that restricted investments in digital assets or provided no guidance on the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
